title: Vault Picking
description: Adds a lock pick item that allows you to reset vaults and open them again
body:
![Vault Picking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b3b703c93f2edbdfa99ad173e7024c214acc83f.png)

### **Description**

Adds a new item called the Vault Lock Pick, which allows you to pick the lock on trial chamber vaults and open them again

Adds a custom advancement when you pick a vault lock for the first time

Demonstration of the item in use in the gallery [Here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vgdmk9aw/images/77d7871e8b4832b4f49388bf4c6911b96e51da5a.gif)

### **Recipes**

![Vault Lock Pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/121f30bad36b89a006fa69cdd7ae9ca318cf163c.png)
![Ominous Vault Lock Pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc3b57628ec63e3ba7fa11ecd2da6780c0a944f.png)

Big thanks to [Gal Sergey](https://modrinth.com/user/GalSergey) for his help.
